gap_D_attribution_permutation_test.verdict: association is NOT significant beyond event density

gap_E_point_accuracy_note: TimesFM ~ seasonal-naive on point accuracy is the EXPECTED result for daily equity ETF prices (low signal-to-noise, weak persistence); TSFM benchmarks confirm foundation models do not consistently beat random-walk on such series. The system's value is the calibrated interval + attribution, not point accuracy.
